creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Oct 14, 2007 at 11:00:25AM +0800, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
>=20
> Hello,
>=20
> Thanks for updating this port, the patch looks good and the building is
> fine.
>=20
> I just have one minor question with this port: could we remove the
> OSVERSION probation part?  Since 502101 is not a officially supported
> version, remove these checks can make this port clearer.

Sure, I completely forgot about that check. Thank you for pointing this
one out!

>=20
> New patch is attached, please check and approve.  Thanks very much.

I approve, thank you for your help!

--=20
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
